description: Rare Townhouse Offering at Millennium Central Lonsdale! This brand new 3 bed, 3 bath home boasts 10 ft ceilings, generous living space, and a thoughtfully designed layout perfect for growing families. Enjoy the convenience of a private 2-car garage with direct access to the unit, plus abundant in-unit storage. High-end finishes throughout include premium Miele appliances, engineered hardwood flooring, air conditioning, and spa-inspired bathrooms. Located just steps from top-rated schools, parks, shopping, and dining in the vibrant Central Lonsdale neighbourhood. A perfect blend of comfort, luxury, and practicality in the heart of North Vancouver.
